case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. CHANGLEE SALIMAS ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-03-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK AS TO DEFENDANT SALIMAS, CHANGLEE AKA CHANG LEE SALIMAS AKA CHANG SALIMAS DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-15-2019
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-03-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100044867) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 200001995)
